project.name: client.build.common
project.description: Include this project when building C# project using NAnt.

echo.message: ********* Not Compiling source files and not checking coding standard style s for ${projectName} *********
update version info in file ${VersionFileToUpdate} from ${VersionInfoFile}
********* Cleaning all the project specfic files under reports directory *********
********* Cleaning all the temporary files in deploy folder *********
********* Running Coverage through Open Cover tool *********
********* Execute the NUnit tests with code coverage enabled *********
********* Generate html file from coverage report *********
********* Copy the generated coverage report into client level build *********
********* Executes FxCop and generate the check style report *********
********* Copy the generated check style report into client level build *********
********* Copy the generated unit test report into client level build *********
